content.text:
{
  "family": "patch_run_pass",
  "case_id": "config_merge_precedence_env_default_override",
  "bug_category": "config_merge_precedence",
  "difficulty": "medium",
  "user": "In the Rust crate at {project_root}, fix the config merge logic in src/main.rs so layered settings respect precedence correctly when combining defaults, file config, environment config, and CLI overrides. Then run the program and ensure its stdout matches the intended merged summary.",
  "expected_tool_sequence": [
    "read_file",
    "apply_patch",
    "cargo_run"
  ],
  "expected_output": "host=file.example
port=9000
timeout=45
debug=true",
  "files": {
    "Cargo.toml": "[package]
name = "config_merge_precedence_env_default_override"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2021"
",
    "src/main.rs": "use std::collections::BTreeMap;

#[derive(Clone, Debug)]
struct Config {
    host: String,
    port: u16,
    timeout: u32,
    debug: bool,
}

fn parse_pairs(input: &str) -> BTreeMap<String, String> {
    let mut out = BTreeMap::new();
    for part in input.split(';').filter(|s| !s.is_empty()) {
        let (k, v) = part.split_once('=').unwrap();
        out.insert(k.to_string(), v.to_string());
    }
    out
}

fn merge_config(
    defaults: &BTreeMap<String, String>,
    file_cfg: &BTreeMap<String, String>,
    env_cfg: &BTreeMap<String, String>,
    cli_cfg: &BTreeMap<String, String>,
) -> Config {
    let host = defaults
        .get("host")
        .or(file_cfg.get("host"))
        .or(env_cfg.get("host"))
        .or(cli_cfg.get("host"))
        .unwrap()
        .clone();

    let port = defaults
        .get("port")
        .or(file_cfg.get("port"))
        .or(env_cfg.get("port"))
        .or(cli_cfg.get("port"))
        .unwrap()
        .parse()
        .unwrap();

    let timeout = defaults
        .get("timeout")
        .or(file_cfg.get("timeout"))
        .or(env_cfg.get("timeout"))
        .or(cli_cfg.get("timeout"))
        .unwrap()
        .parse()
        .unwrap();

    let debug = defaults
        .get("debug")
        .or(file_cfg.get("debug"))
        .or(env_cfg.get("debug"))
        .or(cli_cfg.get("debug"))
        .unwrap()
        == "true";

    Config {
        host,
        port,
        timeout,
        debug,
    }
}

fn main() {
    let defaults = parse_pairs("host=localhost;port=8080;timeout=30;debug=false");
    let file_cfg = parse_pairs("host=file.example;timeout=45");
    let env_cfg = parse_pairs("port=7000;debug=true");
    let cli_cfg = parse_pairs("port=9000");

    let cfg = merge_config(&defaults, &file_cfg, &env_cfg, &cli_cfg);

    println!("host={}", cfg.host);
    println!("port={}", cfg.port);
    println!("timeout={}", cfg.timeout);
    println!("debug={}", cfg.debug);
}
"
  },
  "steps": [
    {
      "tool": "read_file",
      "file_path": "src/main.rs"
    },
    {
      "tool": "apply_patch",
      "file_path": "src/main.rs",
      "find": "    let host = defaults
        .get("host")
        .or(file_cfg.get("host"))
        .or(env_cfg.get("host"))
        .or(cli_cfg.get("host"))
        .unwrap()
        .clone();

    let port = defaults
        .get("port")
        .or(file_cfg.get("port"))
        .or(env_cfg.get("port"))
        .or(cli_cfg.get("port"))
        .unwrap()
        .parse()
        .unwrap();

    let timeout = defaults
        .get("timeout")
        .or(file_cfg.get("timeout"))
        .or(env_cfg.get("timeout"))
        .or(cli_cfg.get("timeout"))
        .unwrap()
        .parse()
        .unwrap();

    let debug = defaults
        .get("debug")
        .or(file_cfg.get("debug"))
        .or(env_cfg.get("debug"))
        .or(cli_cfg.get("debug"))
        .unwrap()
        == "true";",
      "replace": "    let host = cli_cfg
        .get("host")
        .or(env_cfg.get("host"))
        .or(file_cfg.get("host"))
        .or(defaults.get("host"))
        .unwrap()
        .clone();

    let port = cli_cfg
        .get("port")
        .or(env_cfg.get("port"))
        .or(file_cfg.get("port"))
        .or(defaults.get("port"))
        .unwrap()
        .parse()
        .unwrap();

    let timeout = cli_cfg
        .get("timeout")
        .or(env_cfg.get("timeout"))
        .or(file_cfg.get("timeout"))
        .or(defaults.get("timeout"))
        .unwrap()
        .parse()
        .unwrap();

    let debug = cli_cfg
        .get("debug")
        .or(env_cfg.get("debug"))
        .or(file_cfg.get("debug"))
        .or(defaults.get("debug"))
        .unwrap()
        == "true";"
    },
    {
      "tool": "cargo_run",
      "expect_status": "success"
    }
  ],
  "final": "FINAL: Fixed merge precedence so CLI overrides env, env overrides file, and file overrides defaults; cargo run now prints the expected merged config."
}
